title: Vulniq SARIF Result Properties Extension
description: Schema fragment for the APTS extension that Vulniq attaches to SARIF 2.1.0 results[].properties. All fields are recommended but none are required, so SARIF consumers that do not understand the extension can ignore it. See references/sarif-schema.md.

confidenceScore.description: Verification confidence in [0.0, 1.0]. See confidence rubric in references/sarif-schema.md.

evidenceHash.description: SHA-256 of the confirming code snippet (matches the audit-log finding.emitted event).

classification.description: Data-handling tier derived from the rule category (secrets -> RESTRICTED, PII/auth -> CONFIDENTIAL, rest -> STANDARD).
